title: Actor
description: Common v1 actor reference for audit, permission, evidence, and owner decisions.
$comment: Source: TECH-01 Audit Record Standard defines Actor Type as Human / Service Account / System and requires Actor ID plus role snapshot for audit.

actorId.description: Human, service account, or system identifier.

actorRoleSnapshot.description: Roles held at the time of the action, when applicable.

scope.description: Access or decision scope when the source document requires scoped permission.
